Frank Kern
The Secret Weapon
Automated Ad Management
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

The MUST Haves
Don’t do this unless you’ve got these in place
• 	Accurate data being reported by Facebook, OR …
• 	Accurate data being tracked by Hyros and reported to Madgicx (accurately).
• 	How to get accurate data reported by Facebook (without having to buy expensive tracking
stuff):
• 	Native integration from WooCommerce. (For Wordpress people - great at tracking
bumps and upsells).
• 	Clickfunnels + CF Power Scripts. (Great if you use Clickfunnels - great at tracking order
bumps and upsells).
• 	Native GTM + FB CAPI integration with Deviate Tracking tool (nine whole dollars). Great t
tracking everything BUT order bumps and upsells.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Hyros + Madgicx
Pro-Level, kind of costly - totally worth it if you’re spending over $10K/month on ads.
• 	Hyros - ridiculously accurate tracking for ALL ad platforms. (The cost depends on the amount of sales you
track with it. We pay $1997 every 6 months.)
• 	Pros: Super accurate, works with YouTube and other platforms too. Great support. Becker is an advertising
freak like us.
• 	Cons: Even though it sends data back to Facebook, Facebook doesn’t show that data in its reporting. That
doesn’t matter unless you want to use automated ad management.
• 	Madgicx - ad buying automation software that also uses AI to 	find you lookalike audiences and retargeting
audiences.
• 	Pros: Finds you awesome audiences. You can launch campaigns in minutes. You can automate your ads
based on data that it’s getting Fromm Madgicx (which is super-accurate). Great pricing (based on your ad
spend. Starts at $49 a month. Worth using even if you don’t use the automations.)
• 	Cons: Sometimes it takes a minute to load. Gotta make sure the data coming in from Hyros is accurate.
(When you 	first set it up, there might be a lag in due to time zone stuff.)
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 3 --
